info.title: MergeCoberturaXml
info.description:
Copyright (c) 2020 marcelion
-i, --input           Required. The cobertura XML files to merge into a single
file.
-o, --output          Required. The path to write the merged XML file to.
-l, --log             (Default: Information) The log level of the output.
--disable-sanitize    (Default: false) Disables fixing errors in the input
files.
--help                Display this help screen.
--version             Display version information.

options.name: --input
options.description:
Required. The cobertura XML files to merge into a single
file.

options.name: --output
options.description: Required. The path to write the merged XML file to.

options.name: --log
options.description: (Default: Information) The log level of the output.

options.name: --disable-sanitize
options.description:
(Default: false) Disables fixing errors in the input
files.
